name: Butterscotch Banana Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix all dry ingredients except the sugar in a large bowl.
3. In another bowl, cream together butter and sugar until creamy.
4. Add eggs and mashed bananas to the butter mixture. Mix well.
5. Gradually add the flour mixture alternately with milk, mixing until well combined.
6. Stir in butterscotch chips and chopped nuts.
7. Pour batter into two greased and floured loaf pans.
8. Sprinkle remaining nuts on top of the batter.
9. Bake for 60-70 minutes (or 50 minutes if making 4 small loaves).
10. Cool for 14 minutes before removing from pans to prevent sticking.
